prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约11541→13295→12077→21511→17921，2024年因选科调整（物化捆绑）出现大幅后移，2025年有所回升至17921名，近两年波动较大， 2025年基准约17921名；本省物理类计划2021–2024年均为67人，2025年增至69人；2026年计划76人，较2025年扩招约10.1%，扩招幅度明显，竞争压力有 所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年第84名，近年排名稳定在75–84之间，属中上水平理工类高校；该校在声誉监测中未出现 明显负面舆情；抖音热度未进入全国前106名，短视频曝光一般，报考关注度平稳；电气工程A、动力工程及工程热物理A-，能源电力领域学科优势突出，对相关 专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化2024年高热推荐，能源动力类推荐，相关专业社会热度持续偏热；本省2026年物理类考生约25.1万人（按历史比例估算），较2025年24.98万人略有增加，竞争微幅加剧。综合2025年基准位次17921名、2026年扩招约10.1%、本省物理类考生微增及电气/能源专业热度偏高等因素，预计2026年最低位次约19062名，区间18562–19562名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间18562–19562名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向（能源动力类、自动化类），一档电气/计算机类专业作为冲刺，三档经管类专业作为保底；位次明显优于区间下 限（如18500名以内）可重点冲刺电气工程及其自动化等王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 11541 → 13295 → 12077 → 21511 → 17921. In 2024, due to subject selection adjustments (physics-chemistry bundling), there was a significant backward shift. In 2025, it rebounded to 17921. The fluctuations in the past two years have been large, with the 2025 baseline around 17921. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 67 students from 2021 to 2024, increasing to 69 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 76 students, an expansion of about 10.1% compared to 2025, with a clear expansion rate, easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 84th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a stable ranking between 75 and 84 in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of science and engineering universities. The university has not shown significant negative public opinion in reputation monitoring. Its Douyin popularity has not entered the national top 106, with average short video exposure and stable application attention. Electrical Engineering is rated A, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics are rated A-, with prominent disciplinary advantages in the energy and power field, strongly attracting applications for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, Electrical Engineering and Automation was highly recommended, and Energy and Power categories were recommended, with related majors maintaining high social popularity. The provincial Physics Category examinees in 2026 are estimated to be about 251,000 (estimated based on historical proportions), a slight increase from 249,800 in 2025, leading to a slight intensification of competition. Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 17921, the 2026 expansion of about 10.1%, the slight increase in provincial Physics Category examinees, and the high popularity of Electrical/Energy majors, the estimated minimum ranking for 2026 is about 19062, with a range of 18562 to 19562.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Smart Grid Information Engineering
- Computer Science and Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Electronic Information Engineering/Communication Engineering/Electronic Science and Technology
- Automation/Robotics Engineering
- Energy and Power Engineering/New Energy Science and Engineering
- Nuclear Engineering and Nuclear Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Business Administration/Accounting/Finance
- Supply Chain Management/Engineering Management
- Environmental Science and Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 18562–19562, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Energy and Power categories, Automation categories) as the main direction, with Tier 1 Electrical/Computer majors as a sprint, and Tier 3 Economics and Management majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 18500), you can focus on sprinting for flagship majors like Electrical Engineering and Automation.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年第84名，属中上水平高校，对文科考生同样具有品牌吸引力；该校声誉平稳，无明显负面舆情；抖音热度一般，报考关注度稳定；华北电力大学以工科见长，历史类招生专业（法学、英语、行政管理、网络与新媒体、翻译）非该校优势学科领域，但211平台对文科生仍具吸引力。

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基 准位次3621名、2026年招生计划持平、本省历史类考生微增及文科专业热度分化等因素，预计2026年最低位次约3651名，区间3151–4151名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 3740 → 3731 → 3447 → 3884 → 3621, with overall small fluctuations. Over the past 5 years, rankings oscillated narrowly between 3447 and 3884, with a 2025 baseline of about 3621. The provincial History Category enrollment plan was 7 in 2021, 6 in 2022, 7 in 2023, 7 in 2024, and 6 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 6, unchanged from 2025, indicating stable enrollment scale.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 84th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, placing it at an upper-middle level, with brand appeal to liberal arts students. Its reputation is stable with no significant negative public opinion. Douyin popularity is average, and application attention is stable. North China Electric Power University is strong in engineering, and its History Category majors (Law, English, Administrative Management, Network and New Media, Translation) are not its core strengths, but the 211 platform still attracts liberal arts students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is socially recommended (2024), while Network and New Media is clearly discouraged (Journalism and Communication category in 2023). In 2026, the province has approximately 143,000 History Category examinees (estimated by historical proportion), a slight increase from 141,400 in 2025, leading to a minor intensification of competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3621, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the slight increase in provincial History Category examinees, and the divergence in liberal arts major popularity, the predicted 2026 minimum ranking is approximately 3651, with a range of 3151–4151.

- English (Energy and Power International Talent Innovation Class).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: With rankings within the predicted range of 3151–4151, and few History Category majors (only 5), it is recommended to target Law and English (Innovation Class) as Tier 1 sprint options, Administrative Management and Network and New Media as Tier 2 main choices, and Translation as a safety option. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (e.g., within 3200), focus on sprinting for Law.
